RISK_FLAGS.description: A holding company code (NAICS 551112 / UK SIC 64205 family) is present alongside active consumer-facing industry signals. Pattern consistent with a shell or layering structure.
RISK_FLAGS.recommended_action: Trigger UBO verification workflow. Cross-reference Companies House PSC register. Do not approve until beneficial ownership chain is resolved.

RISK_FLAGS.description: Oldest source data is 393 days old. Combined with low source agreement rate, this suggests a potential unconfirmed sector pivot. Registry filings may not reflect current operations.
RISK_FLAGS.recommended_action: Request updated business information. Verify whether business model changes are reflected in Companies House SIC filings.

RISK_FLAGS.description: Sources collectively span 4 distinct NAICS 2-digit sectors. High sector span indicates either legitimate multi-sector operations or a complex corporate structure requiring clarification.
RISK_FLAGS.recommended_action: Request explanation of multi-sector operations. Verify each business line is reflected in Companies House SIC registrations.
